narrative:
Lindsey (precinct in Sandusky County) has 323 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 39.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 27.9 percentage points.
